notes: Core mechanics work (movement, shooting, shields, waves, mystery ship) but aliens are plain colored rectangles with no sprite detail, shields are tiny (4x4 pixel cells in a small 4x4 grid), and alien bullets stop moving after hitting shields due to setting vy=0 without removing the bullet.

A critical bug causes alien bullets to freeze when hitting shields, permanently disabling alien fire once the bullet limit is reached; additionally, shields are rendered as tiny 16x16 pixel blocks and graphics are just basic rectangles.

Core loop, shooting, waves, shields, pause, and game-over work, but visuals are very primitive, there is no player death/reset feedback, alien bullet handling is sloppy after shield hits, and it only loosely resembles proper Space Invaders.
